headings.text: 1- Execute test T0002-1 and open the document created on the Desktop.
Which PowerShell library file is detected?
2- Now go to the atomics path and update the executed script to include all "bak" files.
What is the code snippet that needs to be added to the code?
3- Run the cleanup command for the testT0002-1 and re-execute the test. Open the output file, and investigate the detected files. What is the secret key?
4- Execute test T0002-2 and investigate logs.
What is the new account name?
What is the name of the created service?
6- Which image is used to set the registry value for the created service?
What is the updated file extension?
What is the assigned value of the malicious registry value?
